title: HeartFlow - Non-Invasive Coronary Analysis
problem: Diagnosing coronary artery disease often requires invasive angiography, which carries risks and is resource-intensive.
solution: Non-invasive CT-derived FFRct analysis using computational fluid dynamics and AI to assess coronary artery blockage severity.
technology: Deep learning, computational fluid dynamics, CT image analysis, cloud computing
regulatory_notes: FDA cleared, CE marked, covered by Medicare
varden_fit: Moderate - Diagnostic tool with care pathway implications. Reduces need for invasive procedures. Could integrate into cardiology referral routing.
notes: Breakthrough technology in non-invasive cardiac diagnosis. Strong clinical evidence.
